sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10187" key="a)ntimisqi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμισθ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">requital, recompense,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Rom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.27</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg008.perseus-grc1:6:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
